## Summary

Describe the bug briefly.

## Reproduction

Steps, input, or setup needed to reproduce the issue.

## Expected behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual behavior

What happened instead?

## Extra context

Versions, environment details, screenshots, logs, or links if helpful.
